## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing client projects and team updates.](https://fathom.video/share/QWBP82e5sp4DuQU-o-_2_usPf46hfizs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two new client kickoffs this week (Relay and HyperExponential)](https://fathom.video/share/QWBP82e5sp4DuQU-o-_2_usPf46hfizs?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [AI visibility is becoming a critical expectation for clients; GrowthX's AI visibility tool MVP is nearly ready](https://fathom.video/share/QWBP82e5sp4DuQU-o-_2_usPf46hfizs?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [New agentic workflows in Atlas are showing promising results for content research and drafting](https://fathom.video/share/QWBP82e5sp4DuQU-o-_2_usPf46hfizs?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Several clients (DeepGram, Understory, Ambient, Clerk, Tavern) have ongoing content strategy and production efforts](https://fathom.video/share/QWBP82e5sp4DuQU-o-_2_usPf46hfizs?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Topics

### New Client Kickoffs and Ongoing Projects

  - [Relay and HyperExponential kickoffs scheduled for today](https://fathom.video/share/QWBP82e5sp4DuQU-o-_2_usPf46hfizs?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
